edgeCases: Load failure (uncompilable code / import cycle) -> Fail with go list error, never false Pass
Edge into an unmapped package is ignored; unmapped pkg surfaces separately as Warn
Same-layer and self imports always allowed; test imports fold into package layer
stdlib/third-party imports dropped via segment-boundary module prefix check
Diff filter ignored: whole-module load so out-of-diff violations still Fail
Duplicate layer names union their paths and allow-sets (e.g. domain twice)
